text: Being here, I am enveloped by the ambiance of innovation and inquiry. The sparse, organized setting of the first room lends a sense of quiet anticipation, as if knowledge is about to be exchanged or revealed. Stepping closer to the vibrant exhibit wall in the next space, the explosion of color and the bold proclamation of R+D provoke a sense of curiosity and excitement. I feel a gentle push towards contemplation—how we humans create, adapt, and seek to understand, always in dialogue with the unknown. The design and words invite me to reflect on my own place in this evolving dance of intellect and imagination. Amidst the technology and research, I sense both humility and hope.
